prompt: Transform the Tetris blocks into glowing gemstones, adding a sparkling aura around each piece for an enchanting effect.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform all visible Tetris blocks, including those within the main playing grid, the 'HOLD' area (top-left), and the 'NEXT' area (top-right), into vibrant, glowing gemstones. Ensure each individual gemstone block is encircled by a distinct, sparkling aura, creating an overall enchanting appearance.
objects: Vibrant, glowing gemstone blocks (in main grid, HOLD, and NEXT areas)
Sparkling auras around individual gemstone blocks
SCORE display with numbers and text
LEVEL display with numbers and text
